name: Frip and Froop's Logical Labyrinth DX
short_description: Use unique and fun gadgets to solve mind-bending puzzles in this computer lab-core, Sokoban-like puzzle adventure!
detailed_description:
Test your critical thinking skills as you traverse the FripTech Testing Facility and beyond. Use unique and fun gadgets to solve mind-bending puzzles in this computer lab-core, Sokoban-like puzzle adventure!

A Blast from the Past
Hang on to your test tubes, because Frip and Froop are back!

Released way back in 2014, Frip and Froop's Logical Labyrinth was the first game ever developed by Wayward Thoughts Interactive and Logical Labyrinth DX updates and improves upon the original title with remastered puzzles, new gadgets, an improved story, and an original soundtrack by master musician Marc Dyen!

New Features:

  • Over 120 puzzles across 13 Zones!

  • Two brand new gadgets and three brand new hazards not present in the original game.

  • Completely reworked puzzles and rebalanced difficulty curve.

  • 30 new, more difficult puzzles not present in the original game at all as the post-game Advanced Testing Courses.

  • An expanded FripTech Catalog with bonus art and "DX" symbols next to elements not in the original game.

  • Multiple graphical improvements including 3D camera and objects, higher resolution artwork, and improved animations.

  • Original soundtrack composed by Marc Dyen.

  • Rewritten story.

  • Professional voice acting and recording.

  • Built-in Achievement support AND Steam Achievement support.

  • Cross/Link support with our first title, Super Sketch Bob.

  • Multiple bug fixes and stability improvements.

Utilize Cross/Link to unlock special items in other Wayward Thoughts Interactive games!

By completing the Advanced Testing Courses in Frip and Froop's Logical Labyrinth DX, you'll be able to find a special item which can be transferred to Super Sketch Bob!

Read more about Cross/Link at our website!
